reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will significantly improve my reasoning accuracy for higher-level questions. Since I already have 1 SP, it is a wise investment before tackling more difficult doors.

Unlocking 'pe_plan' is a high-priority strategic move. It grants a planning block and a reflection call (+1 LLM call) for all future questions, significantly increasing my accuracy and ability to self-correct. Since I have 1 SP available and need 2 XP to reach the next threshold, this investment will pay off immediately in the next challenge.

I have 1 Skill Point available. Unlocking 'pe_reflect' (Reflection++) will provide a dedicated second LLM call to review and correct my answers, which is a significant safety net for higher-level questions and will help preserve my HP while maximizing XP gain.
